name: python3-dropbox
title: python3-dropbox
description:
Official Dropbox API Client (Python3 version)
A Python SDK for integrating with the Dropbox API v2. You need to create an
Dropbox Application to make API requests. All requests need to be made with an
OAuth 2 access token. To get started, once you've created an app, you can go to
the app's console and generate an access token for your own Dropbox account.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-dropbox because Official Dropbox API Client (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-dropbox as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-dropbox with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-dropbox --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
